sigmf_io.c
Ir a la documentación de este archivo.
1#include "iq_bench.h"
2
7
8#include <stdio.h>
9#include <stdlib.h>
10#include <string.h>
11
19static int extract_u64(const char *text, const char *key, uint64_t *out_value)
20{
21 /* Naive key search parser; sufficient for fixed SigMF metadata fields. */
22 const char *p = strstr(text, key);
23 if (!p)
24 {
25 return 0;
26 }
27
28 p += strlen(key);
29 p = strchr(p, ':');
30 if (!p)
31 {
32 return 0;
33 }
34 p++;
35
36 while (*p == ' ' || *p == '\t')
37 {
38 p++;
39 }
40
41 char *endp = NULL;
42 double v = strtod(p, &endp);
43 if (endp == p)
44 {
45 return 0;
46 }
47
48 if (v < 0.0)
49 {
50 return 0;
51 }
52
53 *out_value = (uint64_t)(v + 0.5);
54 return 1;
55}
56
63int parse_sigmf_meta(const char *meta_path, sigmf_meta_t *out_meta)
64{
65 /* Reads entire metadata file and extracts sample_rate and center_freq. */
66 FILE *f = fopen(meta_path, "rb");
67 if (!f)
68 {
69 return 0;
70 }
71
72 int ok = 0;
73 char *buf = NULL;
74
75 if (fseek(f, 0, SEEK_END) != 0)
76 {
77 goto cleanup;
78 }
79 long sz = ftell(f);
80 if (sz <= 0)
81 {
82 goto cleanup;
83 }
84 if (fseek(f, 0, SEEK_SET) != 0)
85 {
86 goto cleanup;
87 }
88
89 buf = (char *)malloc((size_t)sz + 1);
90 if (!buf)
91 {
92 goto cleanup;
93 }
94
95 if (fread(buf, 1, (size_t)sz, f) != (size_t)sz)
96 {
97 goto cleanup;
98 }
99 buf[sz] = '\0';
100
101 uint64_t sr = 0;
102 uint64_t cf = 0;
103
104 if (!extract_u64(buf, "core:sample_rate", &sr))
105 {
106 goto cleanup;
107 }
108 if (!extract_u64(buf, "core:frequency", &cf))
109 {
110 goto cleanup;
111 }
112
113 out_meta->sample_rate = (uint32_t)sr;
114 out_meta->center_freq = cf;
115 ok = 1;
116
117cleanup:
118 if (buf)
119 {
120 free(buf);
121 }
122 fclose(f);
123 return ok;
124}
125
135int load_iq_int8_limited(const char *data_path, int8_t **out_raw, size_t *out_bytes, size_t max_complex_samples, mem_tracker_t *mt)
136{
137 /* Bounded file read to keep memory predictable for benchmarking. */
138 FILE *f = fopen(data_path, "rb");
139 if (!f)
140 {
141 return 0;
142 }
143
144 int ok = 0;
145 int8_t *raw = NULL;
146
147 if (fseek(f, 0, SEEK_END) != 0)
148 {
149 goto cleanup;
150 }
151 long sz = ftell(f);
152 if (sz <= 0)
153 {
154 goto cleanup;
155 }
156 if (fseek(f, 0, SEEK_SET) != 0)
157 {
158 goto cleanup;
159 }
160
161 size_t max_bytes = max_complex_samples * 2U;
162 size_t wanted = (size_t)sz;
163 if (wanted > max_bytes)
164 {
165 wanted = max_bytes;
166 }
167
168 raw = (int8_t *)mt_alloc(mt, wanted);
169 if (!raw)
170 {
171 goto cleanup;
172 }
173
174 size_t nread = fread(raw, 1, wanted, f);
175 if (nread == 0)
176 {
177 goto cleanup;
178 }
179
180 *out_raw = raw;
181 *out_bytes = nread;
182 ok = 1;
183
184cleanup:
185 if (!ok && raw)
186 {
187 mt_free(mt, raw, wanted);
188 }
189 fclose(f);
190 return ok;
191}
192
202int load_iq_int8_limited_chunked_into(const char *data_path, int8_t *raw_buf, size_t raw_capacity, size_t *out_bytes, size_t chunk_bytes)
203{
204 if (!data_path || !raw_buf || raw_capacity == 0 || !out_bytes)
205 {
206 return 0;
207 }
208
209 if (chunk_bytes == 0)
210 {
211 chunk_bytes = 64U * 1024U;
212 }
213
214 FILE *f = fopen(data_path, "rb");
215 if (!f)
216 {
217 return 0;
218 }
219
220 int ok = 0;
221 size_t total = 0;
222
223 while (total < raw_capacity)
224 {
225 size_t remain = raw_capacity - total;
226 size_t to_read = (remain < chunk_bytes) ? remain : chunk_bytes;
227 size_t nread = fread(raw_buf + total, 1, to_read, f);
228
229 total += nread;
230
231 if (nread < to_read)
232 {
233 if (feof(f))
234 {
235 break;
236 }
237 if (ferror(f))
238 {
239 goto cleanup;
240 }
241 }
242 }
243
244 if (total == 0)
245 {
246 goto cleanup;
247 }
248
249 /* Keep an even byte count so I/Q pairs are always complete. */
250 if (total & 1U)
251 {
252 total--;
253 }
254 if (total == 0)
255 {
256 goto cleanup;
257 }
258
259 *out_bytes = total;
260 ok = 1;
261
262cleanup:
263 fclose(f);
264 return ok;
265}
266
274void int8_to_complexf(const int8_t *raw, size_t raw_bytes, complexf_t *out_complex, size_t out_n)
275{
276 /* Interleaved input format: I,Q,I,Q... -> complex float. */
277 size_t n = raw_bytes / 2U;
278 if (n > out_n)
279 {
280 n = out_n;
281 }
282
283 for (size_t i = 0; i < n; i++)
284 {
285 out_complex[i].re = (float)raw[2U * i];
286 out_complex[i].im = (float)raw[2U * i + 1U];
287 }
288}
iq_bench.h
Interfaz publica del benchmark C para procesamiento IQ Metodo 3.

void * mt_alloc(mem_tracker_t *mt, size_t bytes)
Reserva memoria y actualiza contadores del tracker.

Libera memoria y actualiza contadores del tracker.

Convierte IQ int8 intercalado a complejo float.

Carga IQ en buffer preasignado por bloques (chunked I/O).

load_iq_int8_limited

Carga IQ int8 con limite de muestras complejas.
